summary: Stunning matrix recording captures a fire‑filled Philly show with a dazzling Crazy Fingers tease.
review: The matrix blend is praised as crystal‑clear and possibly the best version of this concert, delivering an immersive listening experience.  The band was “on fire” in spring 1982, highlighted by a quick Crazy Fingers tease that fans found unforgettable.  No technical flaws or weak moments were reported.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 5‑star, uniformly lauding both the performance and the matrix recording; the show is described as energetic and flawless, while the recording is called “amazing” and “beautiful.”

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly call the matrix blend crystal‑clear, flawless and possibly the best version of this show; no dropouts or muddiness mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy spring‑82 performance with seamless flow; the band stayed “on fire” throughout, highlighted by a quick Crazy Fingers tease near the end of the show.
